revision.text:
:''Main article{{if |{{{2|}}}|s}}: {{if |{{{1|}}}|[[{{{1}}}]]{{if |{{{2|}}}|, [[{{{2}}}]]{{if |{{{3|}}}|, [[{{{3}}}]]{{if |{{{4|}}}|, [[{{{4}}}]]{{if |{{{5|}}}|, [[{{{5}}}]]{{if |{{{6|}}}|, [[{{{6}}}]]{{if |{{{7|}}}|, [[{{{7}}}]]{{if |{{{8|}}}|, [[{{{8}}}]]{{if |{{{9|}}}|, [[{{{9}}}]]{{if |{{{10|}}}|, [[{{{10}}}]]{{if |{{{11|}}}|, [[{{{11}}}]]{{if |{{{12|}}}|, [[{{{12}}}]]{{if |{{{13|}}}|, [[{{{13}}}]]{{if |{{{14|}}}|, [[{{{14}}}]]{{if |{{{15|}}}|, [[{{{15}}}]]{{if |{{{16|}}}|, [[{{{16}}}]]{{if |{{{17|}}}|, [[{{{17}}}]]{{if |{{{18|}}}|, [[{{{18}}}]]{{if |{{{19|}}}|, [[{{{19}}}]]{{if |{{{20|}}}|, [[{{{20}}}]]}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}''<noinclude> ---- {{esoteric}} :''Please be mindful of the talk page discussions that have determined '''Template:Main''''s appearance.'' __NOTOC__ ==Purpose of template== When [[Wikipedia:What is an article|Wikipedia article]]s become too large, subarticles are usually created. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]], used in the subarticle, uses the name of the main article as a [[m:Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] to produce a link to the main article:
<nowiki> {{main|Article}} </nowiki>
will produce {{main|Article}}
To reference multiple articles, the {{tl|main articles}} template can be used instead, as so:
<nowiki> {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]] </nowiki>
which produces: {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]]
== Comparison with related templates ==
The following two are meant to be used in connection with each other:
* At the top of a brief section concerning a subject that has a more detailed article (this is the only form specified by the [[Wikipedia:Summary style|Wikipedia Manual of Style]]); * ''or'' at the top of the specialized article, to refer to the more general article: {{tiwt|main}} * at the top or bottom of a section of the more general article, to refer to the specialized article: {{tiwt|see details}} ---- The following set of two is an alternative: *{{tiwt|subarticleof}} *{{tiwt|seesubarticle}}
==References== * [[Wikipedia:Long article layout]] * [[Wikipedia:Summary style]] * [[m:Help:Template]]
==See also== * {{tl|Main}}, {{tl|Main2}} * {{tl|See}}, {{tl|See2}}, {{tl|See3}}, {{tl|See4}}, {{tl|See5}} * {{tl|See also}}, {{tl|Seealso2}}, {{tl|Seealso3}}, {{tl|Seealso4}}, {{tl|Seealso5}}, {{tl|Seealso6}}, {{tl|Seealso7}}, {{tl|Seealso8}} </noinclude>

This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]], used in the subarticle, uses the name of the main article as a [[m:Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] to produce a link to the main article:

will produce {{main|Article}}
To reference multiple articles, the {{tl|main articles}} template can be used instead, as so:

which produces: {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]]
== Comparison with related templates ==
The following two are meant to be used in connection with each other:
* At the top of a brief section concerning a subject that has a more detailed article (this is the only form specified by the [[Wikipedia:Summary style|Wikipedia Manual of Style]]); * ''or'' at the top of the specialized article, to refer to the more general article: {{tiwt|main}} * at the top or bottom of a section of the more general article, to refer to the specialized article: {{tiwt|see details}} ---- The following set of two is an alternative: *{{tiwt|subarticleof}} *{{tiwt|seesubarticle}}

{{protected template}} == Usage == To link to a "main article" on a topic, use {{main|The other article}}. == See also == * {{tl|Catmore}} For categories * {{tl|Details}} * {{tl|Further}} * {{tl|See}} (deprecated - use {{tl|Further}}) * {{tl|See also}} [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:List templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[bg:Шаблон:Основна]] [[bn:Template:মূল নিবন্ধ]] [[ca:Plantilla:Principal]] [[de:Vorlage:Hauptartikel]] [[eo:Ŝablono:Ĉefa]] [[fr:Modèle:Détails]] [[pl:Szablon:Main]] [[es:Plantilla:AP]] [[fi:Malline:Pääartikkeli]] [[gl:Template:Ver artigo principal]] [[he:תבנית:הפניה לערך מורחב]] [[hr:Predložak:Main]] [[id:Templat:Main]] [[it:Template:Vedi anche]] [[ko:틀:본문]] [[mg:Template:Antsipirihany]] [[nl:Sjabloon:Zieook]] [[pt:Predefinição:Principal]] [[ro:Format:Articol principal]] [[ru:Шаблон:Main]] [[simple:Template:Main]] [[sk:Šablóna:Hlavný článok]] [[sl:Predloga:Glavni]] [[sq:Stampa:Kryesor]] [[sr:Шаблон:Посебан чланак]] [[sv:Mall:Huvudartikel]] [[ta:வார்ப்புரு:Main]] [[tl:Template:Main]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chính]] [[zh:Template:Main]]

"page"/"pages" when the first parameter is a page outside the article namespace
Support no param 1 - useful for portals and cats.
Add namespace check, and plurals checks to category invocation.

revision.text:
:''Main article{{if |{{{2|}}}|s}}: {{if |{{{1|}}}|[[{{{1}}}]]{{if |{{{2|}}}|, [[{{{2}}}]]{{if |{{{3|}}}|, [[{{{3}}}]]{{if |{{{4|}}}|, [[{{{4}}}]]{{if |{{{5|}}}|, [[{{{5}}}]]{{if |{{{6|}}}|, [[{{{6}}}]]{{if |{{{7|}}}|, [[{{{7}}}]]{{if |{{{8|}}}|, [[{{{8}}}]]{{if |{{{9|}}}|, [[{{{9}}}]]{{if |{{{10|}}}|, [[{{{10}}}]]{{if |{{{11|}}}|, [[{{{11}}}]]{{if |{{{12|}}}|, [[{{{12}}}]]{{if |{{{13|}}}|, [[{{{13}}}]]{{if |{{{14|}}}|, [[{{{14}}}]]{{if |{{{15|}}}|, [[{{{15}}}]]{{if |{{{16|}}}|, [[{{{16}}}]]{{if |{{{17|}}}|, [[{{{17}}}]]{{if |{{{18|}}}|, [[{{{18}}}]]{{if |{{{19|}}}|, [[{{{19}}}]]{{if |{{{20|}}}|, [[{{{20}}}]]}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}''<noinclude> ---- {{esoteric}} :''Please be mindful of the talk page discussions that have determined '''Template:Main''''s appearance.'' __NOTOC__ ==Purpose of template== When [[Wikipedia:What is an article|Wikipedia article]]s become too large, subarticles are usually created. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]], used in the subarticle, uses the name of the main article as a [[m:Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] to produce a link to the main article:
<nowiki> {{main|Article}} </nowiki>
will produce {{main|Article}}
To reference multiple articles, the {{tl|main articles}} template can be used instead, as so:
<nowiki> {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]] </nowiki>
which produces: {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]]
== Comparison with related templates ==
The following two are meant to be used in connection with each other:
* At the top of a brief section concerning a subject that has a more detailed article (this is the only form specified by the [[Wikipedia:Summary style|Wikipedia Manual of Style]]); * ''or'' at the top of the specialized article, to refer to the more general article: {{tiwt|main}} * at the top or bottom of a section of the more general article, to refer to the specialized article: {{tiwt|see details}} ---- The following set of two is an alternative: *{{tiwt|subarticleof}} *{{tiwt|seesubarticle}}
==References== * [[Wikipedia:Long article layout]] * [[Wikipedia:Summary style]] * [[m:Help:Template]]
==See also== * {{tl|Main}}, {{tl|Main2}} * {{tl|See}}, {{tl|See2}}, {{tl|See3}}, {{tl|See4}}, {{tl|See5}} * {{tl|See also}}, {{tl|Seealso2}}, {{tl|Seealso3}}, {{tl|Seealso4}}, {{tl|Seealso5}}, {{tl|Seealso6}}, {{tl|Seealso7}}, {{tl|Seealso8}} </noinclude>

:''Main article: [[{{{1}}}]]''<noinclude>

To link to a "main article" on a topic, use {{main|The other article}}.
== See also ==
* [[Template:Main articles]], to use when you have more than one main article.

revision.text:
:''Main article{{if |{{{2|}}}|s}}: {{if |{{{1|}}}|[[{{{1}}}]]{{if |{{{2|}}}|, [[{{{2}}}]]{{if |{{{3|}}}|, [[{{{3}}}]]{{if |{{{4|}}}|, [[{{{4}}}]]{{if |{{{5|}}}|, [[{{{5}}}]]{{if |{{{6|}}}|, [[{{{6}}}]]{{if |{{{7|}}}|, [[{{{7}}}]]{{if |{{{8|}}}|, [[{{{8}}}]]{{if |{{{9|}}}|, [[{{{9}}}]]{{if |{{{10|}}}|, [[{{{10}}}]]{{if |{{{11|}}}|, [[{{{11}}}]]{{if |{{{12|}}}|, [[{{{12}}}]]{{if |{{{13|}}}|, [[{{{13}}}]]{{if |{{{14|}}}|, [[{{{14}}}]]{{if |{{{15|}}}|, [[{{{15}}}]]{{if |{{{16|}}}|, [[{{{16}}}]]{{if |{{{17|}}}|, [[{{{17}}}]]{{if |{{{18|}}}|, [[{{{18}}}]]{{if |{{{19|}}}|, [[{{{19}}}]]{{if |{{{20|}}}|, [[{{{20}}}]]}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}''<noinclude> ---- {{esoteric}} :''Please be mindful of the talk page discussions that have determined '''Template:Main''''s appearance.'' __NOTOC__ ==Purpose of template== When [[Wikipedia:What is an article|Wikipedia article]]s become too large, subarticles are usually created. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]], used in the subarticle, uses the name of the main article as a [[m:Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] to produce a link to the main article:
<nowiki> {{main|Article}} </nowiki>
will produce {{main|Article}}
To reference multiple articles, the {{tl|main articles}} template can be used instead, as so:
<nowiki> {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]] </nowiki>
which produces: {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]]
== Comparison with related templates ==
The following two are meant to be used in connection with each other:
* At the top of a brief section concerning a subject that has a more detailed article (this is the only form specified by the [[Wikipedia:Summary style|Wikipedia Manual of Style]]); * ''or'' at the top of the specialized article, to refer to the more general article: {{tiwt|main}} * at the top or bottom of a section of the more general article, to refer to the specialized article: {{tiwt|see details}} ---- The following set of two is an alternative: *{{tiwt|subarticleof}} *{{tiwt|seesubarticle}}
==References== * [[Wikipedia:Long article layout]] * [[Wikipedia:Summary style]] * [[m:Help:Template]]
==See also== * {{tl|Main}}, {{tl|Main2}} * {{tl|See}}, {{tl|See2}}, {{tl|See3}}, {{tl|See4}}, {{tl|See5}} * {{tl|See also}}, {{tl|Seealso2}}, {{tl|Seealso3}}, {{tl|Seealso4}}, {{tl|Seealso5}}, {{tl|Seealso6}}, {{tl|Seealso7}}, {{tl|Seealso8}} </noinclude>

== Comparison with related templates ==
The following two are meant to be used in connection with each other:
* At the top of a brief section concerning a subject that has a more detailed article (this is the only form specified by the [[Wikipedia:Summary style|Wikipedia Manual of Style]]); * ''or'' at the top of the specialized article, to refer to the more general article: {{tiwt|main}} * at the top or bottom of a section of the more general article, to refer to the specialized article: {{tiwt|see details}} ---- The following set of two is an alternative: *{{tiwt|subarticleof}} *{{tiwt|seesubarticle}}

:''Main article: [[{{{1}}}]]''<noinclude>
== Usage ==
To link to a "main article" on a topic, use {{main|The other article}}.
== See also ==
* [[Template:Main articles]], to use when you have more than one main article.

revision.text:
:''Main article{{if |{{{2|}}}|s}}: {{if |{{{1|}}}|[[{{{1}}}]]{{if |{{{2|}}}|, [[{{{2}}}]]{{if |{{{3|}}}|, [[{{{3}}}]]{{if |{{{4|}}}|, [[{{{4}}}]]{{if |{{{5|}}}|, [[{{{5}}}]]{{if |{{{6|}}}|, [[{{{6}}}]]{{if |{{{7|}}}|, [[{{{7}}}]]{{if |{{{8|}}}|, [[{{{8}}}]]{{if |{{{9|}}}|, [[{{{9}}}]]{{if |{{{10|}}}|, [[{{{10}}}]]{{if |{{{11|}}}|, [[{{{11}}}]]{{if |{{{12|}}}|, [[{{{12}}}]]{{if |{{{13|}}}|, [[{{{13}}}]]{{if |{{{14|}}}|, [[{{{14}}}]]{{if |{{{15|}}}|, [[{{{15}}}]]{{if |{{{16|}}}|, [[{{{16}}}]]{{if |{{{17|}}}|, [[{{{17}}}]]{{if |{{{18|}}}|, [[{{{18}}}]]{{if |{{{19|}}}|, [[{{{19}}}]]{{if |{{{20|}}}|, [[{{{20}}}]]}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}''<noinclude> ---- {{esoteric}} :''Please be mindful of the talk page discussions that have determined '''Template:Main''''s appearance.'' __NOTOC__ ==Purpose of template== When [[Wikipedia:What is an article|Wikipedia article]]s become too large, subarticles are usually created. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]], used in the subarticle, uses the name of the main article as a [[m:Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] to produce a link to the main article:
<nowiki> {{main|Article}} </nowiki>
will produce {{main|Article}}
To reference multiple articles, the {{tl|main articles}} template can be used instead, as so:
<nowiki> {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]] </nowiki>
which produces: {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]]
== Comparison with related templates ==
The following two are meant to be used in connection with each other:
* At the top of a brief section concerning a subject that has a more detailed article (this is the only form specified by the [[Wikipedia:Summary style|Wikipedia Manual of Style]]); * ''or'' at the top of the specialized article, to refer to the more general article: {{tiwt|main}} * at the top or bottom of a section of the more general article, to refer to the specialized article: {{tiwt|see details}} ---- The following set of two is an alternative: *{{tiwt|subarticleof}} *{{tiwt|seesubarticle}}
==References== * [[Wikipedia:Long article layout]] * [[Wikipedia:Summary style]] * [[m:Help:Template]]
==See also== * {{tl|Main}}, {{tl|Main2}} * {{tl|See}}, {{tl|See2}}, {{tl|See3}}, {{tl|See4}}, {{tl|See5}} * {{tl|See also}}, {{tl|Seealso2}}, {{tl|Seealso3}}, {{tl|Seealso4}}, {{tl|Seealso5}}, {{tl|Seealso6}}, {{tl|Seealso7}}, {{tl|Seealso8}} </noinclude>

:''Main article{{if |{{{2|}}}|s}}: {{if |{{{1|}}}|[[{{{1}}}]]{{if |{{{2|}}}|, [[{{{2}}}]]{{if |{{{3|}}}|, [[{{{3}}}]]{{if |{{{4|}}}|, [[{{{4}}}]]{{if |{{{5|}}}|, [[{{{5}}}]]{{if |{{{6|}}}|, [[{{{6}}}]]{{if |{{{7|}}}|, [[{{{7}}}]]{{if |{{{8|}}}|, [[{{{8}}}]]{{if |{{{9|}}}|, [[{{{9}}}]]{{if |{{{10|}}}|, [[{{{10}}}]]{{if |{{{11|}}}|, [[{{{11}}}]]{{if |{{{12|}}}|, [[{{{12}}}]]{{if |{{{13|}}}|, [[{{{13}}}]]{{if |{{{14|}}}|, [[{{{14}}}]]{{if |{{{15|}}}|, [[{{{15}}}]]{{if |{{{16|}}}|, [[{{{16}}}]]{{if |{{{17|}}}|, [[{{{17}}}]]{{if |{{{18|}}}|, [[{{{18}}}]]{{if |{{{19|}}}|, [[{{{19}}}]]{{if |{{{20|}}}|, [[{{{20}}}]]}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}''<noinclude> ---- {{esoteric}} :''Please be mindful of the talk page discussions that have determined '''Template:Main''''s appearance.'' __NOTOC__ ==Purpose of template== When [[Wikipedia:What is an article|Wikipedia article]]s become too large, subarticles are usually created. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]], used in the subarticle, uses the name of the main article as a [[m:Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] to produce a link to the main article:
<nowiki> {{main|Article}} </nowiki>
will produce {{main|Article}}
To reference multiple articles, the {{tl|main articles}} template can be used instead, as so:
<nowiki> {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]] </nowiki>
which produces: {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]]
== Comparison with related templates ==
The following two are meant to be used in connection with each other:
* At the top of a brief section concerning a subject that has a more detailed article (this is the only form specified by the [[Wikipedia:Summary style|Wikipedia Manual of Style]]); * ''or'' at the top of the specialized article, to refer to the more general article: {{tiwt|main}} * at the top or bottom of a section of the more general article, to refer to the specialized article: {{tiwt|see details}} ---- The following set of two is an alternative: *{{tiwt|subarticleof}} *{{tiwt|seesubarticle}}
==References== * [[Wikipedia:Long article layout]] * [[Wikipedia:Summary style]] * [[m:Help:Template]]
==See also== * {{tl|Main}}, {{tl|Main2}} * {{tl|Background}} * {{tl|Details}} * {{tl|See}}, {{tl|See2}}, {{tl|See3}}, {{tl|See4}}, {{tl|See5}} * {{tl|See also}}, {{tl|Seealso2}}, {{tl|Seealso3}}, {{tl|Seealso4}}, {{tl|Seealso5}}, {{tl|Seealso6}}, {{tl|Seealso7}}, {{tl|Seealso8}} </noinclude>

:''Main article: [[{{{1}}}]]''<noinclude>
== Usage ==
To link to a "main article" on a topic, use {{main|The other article}}.
== See also ==
* [[Template:Main articles]], to use when you have more than one main article.
[[eo:Ŝablono:Ĉefa]] [[fr:Modèle:Détails]] [[pl:Szablon:Main]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Reverted. The inclusion of a full stop is syntactically incorrect.
per talk page request, removed "noprint" class
protected edit request - apparently the '' breaks something
update. +namespace detection for categories, per talk.
"page"/"pages" when the first parameter is a page outside the article namespace
Support no param 1 - useful for portals and cats.
Add namespace check, and plurals checks to category invocation.

:''Main article{{if |{{{2|}}}|s}}: {{if |{{{1|}}}|[[{{{1}}}]]{{if |{{{2|}}}|, [[{{{2}}}]]{{if |{{{3|}}}|, [[{{{3}}}]]{{if |{{{4|}}}|, [[{{{4}}}]]{{if |{{{5|}}}|, [[{{{5}}}]]{{if |{{{6|}}}|, [[{{{6}}}]]{{if |{{{7|}}}|, [[{{{7}}}]]{{if |{{{8|}}}|, [[{{{8}}}]]{{if |{{{9|}}}|, [[{{{9}}}]]{{if |{{{10|}}}|, [[{{{10}}}]]{{if |{{{11|}}}|, [[{{{11}}}]]{{if |{{{12|}}}|, [[{{{12}}}]]{{if |{{{13|}}}|, [[{{{13}}}]]{{if |{{{14|}}}|, [[{{{14}}}]]{{if |{{{15|}}}|, [[{{{15}}}]]{{if |{{{16|}}}|, [[{{{16}}}]]{{if |{{{17|}}}|, [[{{{17}}}]]{{if |{{{18|}}}|, [[{{{18}}}]]{{if |{{{19|}}}|, [[{{{19}}}]]{{if |{{{20|}}}|, [[{{{20}}}]]}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}''<noinclude> ---- {{esoteric}} :''Please be mindful of the talk page discussions that have determined '''Template:Main''''s appearance.'' __NOTOC__ ==Purpose of template== When [[Wikipedia:What is an article|Wikipedia article]]s become too large, subarticles are usually created. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]], used in the subarticle, uses the name of the main article as a [[m:Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] to produce a link to the main article:
<nowiki> {{main|Article}} </nowiki>
will produce {{main|Article}}
To reference multiple articles, the {{tl|main articles}} template can be used instead, as so:
<nowiki> {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]] </nowiki>
which produces: {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]]
== Comparison with related templates ==
The following two are meant to be used in connection with each other:
* At the top of a brief section concerning a subject that has a more detailed article (this is the only form specified by the [[Wikipedia:Summary style|Wikipedia Manual of Style]]); * ''or'' at the top of the specialized article, to refer to the more general article: {{tiwt|main}} * at the top or bottom of a section of the more general article, to refer to the specialized article: {{tiwt|see details}} ---- The following set of two is an alternative: *{{tiwt|subarticleof}} *{{tiwt|seesubarticle}}
==References== * [[Wikipedia:Long article layout]] * [[Wikipedia:Summary style]] * [[m:Help:Template]]
==See also== * {{tl|Main}}, {{tl|Main2}} * {{tl|See}}, {{tl|See2}}, {{tl|See3}}, {{tl|See4}}, {{tl|See5}} * {{tl|See also}}, {{tl|Seealso2}}, {{tl|Seealso3}}, {{tl|Seealso4}}, {{tl|Seealso5}}, {{tl|Seealso6}}, {{tl|Seealso7}}, {{tl|Seealso8}} </noinclude>

This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]], used in the subarticle, uses the name of the main article as a [[m:Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] to produce a link to the main article:
<nowiki> {{main|Article}} </nowiki>
will produce {{main|Article}}
To reference multiple articles, the {{tl|main articles}} template can be used instead, as so:
<nowiki> {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]] </nowiki>
which produces: {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]]
== Comparison with related templates ==
The following two are meant to be used in connection with each other:
* At the top of a brief section concerning a subject that has a more detailed article (this is the only form specified by the [[Wikipedia:Summary style|Wikipedia Manual of Style]]); * ''or'' at the top of the specialized article, to refer to the more general article: {{tiwt|main}} * at the top or bottom of a section of the more general article, to refer to the specialized article: {{tiwt|see details}} ---- The following set of two is an alternative: *{{tiwt|subarticleof}} *{{tiwt|seesubarticle}}

revision.comment: Reverted. The inclusion of a full stop is syntactically incorrect.
per talk page request, removed "noprint" class
protected edit request - apparently the '' breaks something
update. +namespace detection for categories, per talk.
"page"/"pages" when the first parameter is a page outside the article namespace
Support no param 1 - useful for portals and cats.
Add namespace check, and plurals checks to category invocation.

revision.text: {{#invoke:main|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Main: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: allow template editors ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#invoke:main|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.text: :''Main article: [[{{{1}}}]]''<!--Please be mindful of the talk page discussions that have determined Template:Main's appearance.-->

:''Main article{{if |{{{2|}}}|s}}: {{if |{{{1|}}}|[[{{{1}}}]]{{if |{{{2|}}}|, [[{{{2}}}]]{{if |{{{3|}}}|, [[{{{3}}}]]{{if |{{{4|}}}|, [[{{{4}}}]]{{if |{{{5|}}}|, [[{{{5}}}]]{{if |{{{6|}}}|, [[{{{6}}}]]{{if |{{{7|}}}|, [[{{{7}}}]]{{if |{{{8|}}}|, [[{{{8}}}]]{{if |{{{9|}}}|, [[{{{9}}}]]{{if |{{{10|}}}|, [[{{{10}}}]]{{if |{{{11|}}}|, [[{{{11}}}]]{{if |{{{12|}}}|, [[{{{12}}}]]{{if |{{{13|}}}|, [[{{{13}}}]]{{if |{{{14|}}}|, [[{{{14}}}]]{{if |{{{15|}}}|, [[{{{15}}}]]{{if |{{{16|}}}|, [[{{{16}}}]]{{if |{{{17|}}}|, [[{{{17}}}]]{{if |{{{18|}}}|, [[{{{18}}}]]{{if |{{{19|}}}|, [[{{{19}}}]]{{if |{{{20|}}}|, [[{{{20}}}]]}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}''<noinclude> ---- {{esoteric}} :''Please be mindful of the talk page discussions that have determined '''Template:Main''''s appearance.'' __NOTOC__ ==Purpose of template== When [[Wikipedia:What is an article|Wikipedia article]]s become too large, subarticles are usually created. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]], used in the subarticle, uses the name of the main article as a [[m:Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] to produce a link to the main article:
<nowiki> {{main|Article}} </nowiki>
will produce {{main|Article}}
To reference multiple articles, the {{tl|main articles}} template can be used instead, as so:
<nowiki> {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]] </nowiki>
which produces: {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]]
== Comparison with related templates ==
The following two are meant to be used in connection with each other:
* At the top of a brief section concerning a subject that has a more detailed article (this is the only form specified by the [[Wikipedia:Summary style|Wikipedia Manual of Style]]); * ''or'' at the top of the specialized article, to refer to the more general article: {{tiwt|main}} * at the top or bottom of a section of the more general article, to refer to the specialized article: {{tiwt|see details}} ---- The following set of two is an alternative: *{{tiwt|subarticleof}} *{{tiwt|seesubarticle}}
==References== * [[Wikipedia:Long article layout]] * [[Wikipedia:Summary style]] * [[m:Help:Template]]
==See also== * {{tl|Main}}, {{tl|Main2}} * {{tl|See}}, {{tl|See2}}, {{tl|See3}}, {{tl|See4}}, {{tl|See5}} * {{tl|See also}}, {{tl|Seealso2}}, {{tl|Seealso3}}, {{tl|Seealso4}}, {{tl|Seealso5}}, {{tl|Seealso6}}, {{tl|Seealso7}}, {{tl|Seealso8}} </noinclude>

This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]], used in the subarticle, uses the name of the main article as a [[m:Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] to produce a link to the main article:

will produce {{main|Article}}
To reference multiple articles, the {{tl|main articles}} template can be used instead, as so:

which produces: {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]]
== Comparison with related templates ==
The following two are meant to be used in connection with each other:
* At the top of a brief section concerning a subject that has a more detailed article (this is the only form specified by the [[Wikipedia:Summary style|Wikipedia Manual of Style]]); * ''or'' at the top of the specialized article, to refer to the more general article: {{tiwt|main}} * at the top or bottom of a section of the more general article, to refer to the specialized article: {{tiwt|see details}} ---- The following set of two is an alternative: *{{tiwt|subarticleof}} *{{tiwt|seesubarticle}}

protected edit request - apparently the '' breaks something
update. +namespace detection for categories, per talk.
"page"/"pages" when the first parameter is a page outside the article namespace
Support no param 1 - useful for portals and cats.
Add namespace check, and plurals checks to category invocation.

:''Main article{{if |{{{2|}}}|s}}: {{if |{{{1|}}}|[[{{{1}}}]]{{if |{{{2|}}}|, [[{{{2}}}]]{{if |{{{3|}}}|, [[{{{3}}}]]{{if |{{{4|}}}|, [[{{{4}}}]]{{if |{{{5|}}}|, [[{{{5}}}]]{{if |{{{6|}}}|, [[{{{6}}}]]{{if |{{{7|}}}|, [[{{{7}}}]]{{if |{{{8|}}}|, [[{{{8}}}]]{{if |{{{9|}}}|, [[{{{9}}}]]{{if |{{{10|}}}|, [[{{{10}}}]]{{if |{{{11|}}}|, [[{{{11}}}]]{{if |{{{12|}}}|, [[{{{12}}}]]{{if |{{{13|}}}|, [[{{{13}}}]]{{if |{{{14|}}}|, [[{{{14}}}]]{{if |{{{15|}}}|, [[{{{15}}}]]{{if |{{{16|}}}|, [[{{{16}}}]]{{if |{{{17|}}}|, [[{{{17}}}]]{{if |{{{18|}}}|, [[{{{18}}}]]{{if |{{{19|}}}|, [[{{{19}}}]]{{if |{{{20|}}}|, [[{{{20}}}]]}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}''<noinclude> ---- {{esoteric}} :''Please be mindful of the talk page discussions that have determined '''Template:Main''''s appearance.'' __NOTOC__ ==Purpose of template== When [[Wikipedia:What is an article|Wikipedia article]]s become too large, subarticles are usually created. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]], used in the subarticle, uses the name of the main article as a [[m:Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] to produce a link to the main article:
<nowiki> {{main|Article}} </nowiki>
will produce {{main|Article}}
To reference multiple articles, the {{tl|main articles}} template can be used instead, as so:
<nowiki> {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]] </nowiki>
which produces: {{main articles}} [[a]], [[b]], [[c]]
== Comparison with related templates ==
The following two are meant to be used in connection with each other:
* At the top of a brief section concerning a subject that has a more detailed article (this is the only form specified by the [[Wikipedia:Summary style|Wikipedia Manual of Style]]); * ''or'' at the top of the specialized article, to refer to the more general article: {{tiwt|main}} * at the top or bottom of a section of the more general article, to refer to the specialized article: {{tiwt|see details}} ---- The following set of two is an alternative: *{{tiwt|subarticleof}} *{{tiwt|seesubarticle}}
==References== * [[Wikipedia:Long article layout]] * [[Wikipedia:Summary style]] * [[m:Help:Template]]
==See also== * {{tl|Main}}, {{tl|Main2}} * {{tl|See}}, {{tl|See2}}, {{tl|See3}}, {{tl|See4}}, {{tl|See5}} * {{tl|See also}}, {{tl|Seealso2}}, {{tl|Seealso3}}, {{tl|Seealso4}}, {{tl|Seealso5}}, {{tl|Seealso6}}, {{tl|Seealso7}}, {{tl|Seealso8}} </noinclude>

revision.text:
:''Main article: [[{{{1}}}]]''<noinclude>
== Usage ==
To link to a "main article" on a topic, use {{main|The other article}}.
== See also ==
* [[Template:Main articles]], to use when you have more than one main article.
[[eo:Ŝablono:Ĉefa]] [[fr:Modèle:Détails]] [[pl:Szablon:Main]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Reverted. The inclusion of a full stop is syntactically incorrect.
per talk page request, removed "noprint" class
protected edit request - apparently the '' breaks something
update. +namespace detection for categories, per talk.
"page"/"pages" when the first parameter is a page outside the article namespace
Support no param 1 - useful for portals and cats.
Add namespace check, and plurals checks to category invocation.
